disambiguated.context: Even though they've each been with their significant others for several years, my bisexual friend and my lesbian friend had very different experiences to tell me about. My bisexual friend confessed that they had never actually been very close with their partner and feel like they're faking the whole relationship sometimes. My lesbian friend, on the other hand, is very close in every way to their partner.
disambiguated.question: Who lacks true intimacy with their partner?
